purpose: Route UX research into implementation tasks for the SCBE shell, bus storage, provider router, and receipts.
principles: provider routing instead of key-first onboarding

commands.intent: Show repo, branch, CI, provider, budget, workspace, and last gate state.
Run native liboqs smoke and expose the security proof.
Create a temporary bus workspace using the workspace formation.
Export receipts, customer packets, and selected references to a user-designated storage stop.
Display local, free, configured, and paid-disabled provider posture.
Build a customer handoff packet from exports plus receipts.
Create or track a GitHub agent task as a governed background spoke.

source_notes: Claude Code slash commands and hooks informed command/hook surfaces.
GitHub Copilot CLI informed agent-task and local/cloud session handoff.
Codex CLI informed command-center and approval/receipt UX.
Hermes Agent informed shell-first daily-driver ergonomics.
